title: SimpleDeathSwap
description: Famous game where 2 players challenge each other until one of them dies
body:
## Famous game where 2 players challenge each other until one of them dies. The game is very simple: the two players will have to try hard to endanger their opponent, even using creative for a small period of time, and when the time runs out, death swap!


![Commands](https://github.com/EscanorTargaryen/SimpleDeathSwap/blob/main/img/commands.png?raw=true)
#### /simpledeathswap start - Start a new game with a player. #### /simpledeathswap stopgame - Stop the current game.


![Permissions](https://github.com/EscanorTargaryen/SimpleDeathSwap/blob/main/img/permissions.png?raw=true)
#### simpledeathswap - Permission to use /simpledeathswap #### simpledeathswap.gamestart - Permission to start a new game. #### simpledeathswap.stopgame - Permission to stop a game. Only the owner can disband the game.

The plugin is currently in its first version and many changes can be made. For advice/problems regarding the plugin you can join our Discord server
